title: Skirmisher ship
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Skirmisher ships''' were [[Starship/Legends|starships]] of the [[Confederate Navy/Legends|Confederate Navy]], used to send [[Battle droid/Legends|battle droids]] to board hostile [[Capital ship/Legends|capital ships]]. They were deployed prior to the [[Battle of Praesitlyn]], in near-orbit of that [[Planet/Legends|planet]], activating their [[Cloaking device/Legends|cloaking devices]] and ambushing the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]] battle fleet as it approached. One such skirmisher was used to successfully board the Republic [[Command ship/Legends|command ship]] [[Ranger (Centax-class)|''Ranger'']], albeit only temporarily.

{{Ship-stub}}

==Appearances==
*''[[Jedi Trial]]''
